title: gymnanthemum molle
intro: Gymnanthemum molle, also known as the dwarf feverfew, is a perennial herb native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Gymnanthemum molle include its ability to reduce fever, relieve headaches and migraines, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Gymnanthemum molle can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams for external use.
